chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1882 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions 1. For orders on CMA No.3835/2025 (Ex.A) 2. For orders on CMA No.3836/2025 (C/A) 19.11.2025 None present for the Petitioner Muhammad Suleman Dahri, Assistant Manager (Legal) SEPCO and Deepak Kumar, HR&Admn, Director SEPCO present >>>>>..<<<<< Syed Tanveer Abbas Shah, Advocate files vakalatnama and comments to the Contempt Application on behalf of Contemnor No.3, which are taken on record. Counsel for the Contemnor submits that since the order has already been complied with and on that basis the previous contempt application was dismissed on 22.05.2025, in spite of that afresh contempt application has been filed without any cause of action. We have perused the order dated 22.05.2025 as well as the comments filed by the alleged contemnor today. Upon consideration of the matter, we are of the view that no case for contempt is made out. Accordingly, the Contempt Application stands dismissed. It is observed that the applicant/petitioner has filed a second contempt application on incorrect facts. Though the circumstances warranted the imposition of costs, taking a lenient view, we refrain from doing so. The petitioner is, however, cautioned to remain careful in the future. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
